author: Nintendo of America
text:
Order of the Sinking Star – Overview Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Order of the Sinking Star is coming to Nintendo Switch 2! 

As you embark on a massive adventure set in a realm of magic and monsters, you'll solve over 1,000 interconnected, hand-crafted puzzles, discover unique playable heroes, master evolving gameplay mechanics, and decipher a grand mystery.  

#NintendoSwitch2 #OrderoftheSinkingStar 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo

author: Nintendo of America
text:
Yoshi and the Mysterious Book – An Appetite for Discovery – Nintendo Switch 2
The Yoshi and the Mysterious Book game launches May 21, 2026, only on the Nintendo Switch 2 system. Pre-orders are available now on Nintendo eShop: https://ninten.do/6000vDvZA

Help a mysterious talking book named Mr. E remember the creatures living within his pages while satisfying Yoshi’s appetite for discovery! Explore the pages, find all kinds of fascinating creatures, and see what each one can do!

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America
text:
Fortnite x Overwatch – Gameplay Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play the Fortnite x Overwatch collaboration now on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/fortnite-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1064-01&utm_id=P1064-01 

Play Overwatch heroes D.Va, Genji, Tracer, and Mercy now in Fortnite! Experience new abilities, locations, and gameplay across Battle Royale, Zero Build, Reload, and more. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #Fortnite #Overwatch 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America
text:
The Splatoon 3 North American League Show 2026 – Episode 7
Can you believe we're halfway through this competitive season already? Check out the latest competitive news on this episode of the Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 Show! Hear about last week's matchups, Guess the Character, and more. #Splatoon3NAL2026

Tune in to this week's Splatoon 3 North American League 2026 Event #7 livestream on Saturday, May 16 at 4pm PT here: https://www.youtube.com/live/WU2T52Ag4mU

Interested in competing? Register here: https://battlefy.com/nintendovs/splatoon3-north-american-league/?utm_source=Events&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=N1122-01&utm_id=N1122-01
- NOTE: This is the LAST time you can register while still having a competitive chance! Feel free to register for fun after this week, but you will not have enough points to potentially qualify for playoffs.

Catch up on previous episodes and livestreams here: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL2JiZAV5BmDXkhjMHRXksU8m6-1y3LUbi

Nintendo Switch Online membership (sold separately) and Nintendo Account required for online features. Membership auto-renews after initial term at the then-current price unless canceled. Not available in all countries. Internet access required for online features. Terms apply. nintendo.com/purchase-terms/

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: www.nintendo.com/us/whatsnew/splatoon-3-north-american-league-2026/

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

Follow Nintendo of America
X/Twitter: https://twitter.com/NintendoAmerica
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NintendoAmerica
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nintendoamerica
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/nintendo
